title: ux-RadioGroup
text: ux-RadioGroup This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-RadioGroup properties. ux-RadioGroup widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-RadioGroup Maps to physical widget: of type boolean Default definition: ux-RadioGroup=uxRadioGroup() Supported triggers: onChange Use for: Fields to add a list of options to make a mutually exclusive choice. Questionnaires, Forms, Modals, and Choices that need a confirmation, are some example use cases of a radio group. Related Links uxradiogroup The uxradiogroup widget is a button input control. It allows users to select a single item from a short list of options to make a choice. You can use uxradiogroup in layouts where you want to add a list of options to make a choice and view all options at once. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
